resume.summary: Software engineer with 4 years of experience building web applications and internal tools using TypeScript, React, and Node.js.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Built customer-facing dashboards in React and TypeScript used by 12 internal teams.
Designed REST APIs in Node.js backed by PostgreSQL, reducing report generation time by 30%.
Collaborated with product and design on feature delivery in two-week agile sprints.
Wrote unit and integration tests with Jest, improving release confidence for the team.

responsibilities: Design and implement scalable web applications across the stack.
Collaborate with product managers and designers to deliver user-facing features.
qualifications: 3+ years of professional software development experience.

originalMatch.explanation: Strong overlap on core stack (TypeScript, React, Node, PostgreSQL). Missing preferred cloud and container tooling; responsibility language could map more directly to JD phrasing.

tailoredMatch.explanation: Tailored bullets emphasize full-stack delivery, agile collaboration, and scalable APIs without adding unverified cloud experience. Preferred skills AWS/Docker remain gaps to address honestly.

gaps.name: AWS
gaps.resumeEvidence: Not mentioned in resume or bullets
gaps.suggestedAction: Add to skills only if you have used AWS; otherwise prepare to discuss learning plan in interview.

gaps.name: Docker
gaps.suggestedAction: Leave out if not true; mention familiarity if you have used containers in side projects.

tailoredResume.tailoredSummary: Full stack software engineer with 4 years delivering TypeScript/React front ends and Node.js REST APIs on PostgreSQL, focused on scalable, customer-facing product features in agile teams.

bullets.original: Built customer-facing dashboards in React and TypeScript used by 12 internal teams.
bullets.tailored: Delivered scalable, customer-facing React and TypeScript dashboards used by 12 cross-functional teams.
bullets.changeReason: Aligned with JD emphasis on user-facing features and scalable applications.

bullets.original: Designed REST APIs in Node.js backed by PostgreSQL, reducing report generation time by 30%.
bullets.tailored: Designed and implemented Node.js REST APIs on PostgreSQL, improving report generation performance by 30%.
bullets.changeReason: Mirrors JD language for API design and performance without changing the metric.

bullets.original: Collaborated with product and design on feature delivery in two-week agile sprints.
bullets.tailored: Partnered with product managers and designers to ship features in two-week agile sprints.
bullets.changeReason: Maps collaboration wording to JD responsibilities.

bullets.original: Wrote unit and integration tests with Jest, improving release confidence for the team.
bullets.tailored: Wrote unit and integration tests with Jest and participated in code reviews to improve release quality.
bullets.changeReason: Connects testing practice to JD code quality expectations.
